prophet/prophet-polymarket-edge.reason: Read-only at v1 by design (SKILL.md launch contract; design doc §13.10 / §15). `--yes-live` always exits non-zero. The runtime never places orders, holds inventory, or interacts with the CLOB. `scripts/trading_safety.py` exists ONLY to encode the three preconditions any future trading-enable PR must satisfy — its docstrings mirror trading-domain language from sibling Polymarket skills, which causes the pattern-based detector to classify this skill as trading. The order-book / marketability / pre-trade checklist rules apply only when execution is wired; at v1 they have nothing to validate. Issue #454 tracks the gate contract; revisit waivers when a future PR re-enables execution.
